text.title: IaC Module Composition Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: break cycle by moving contested resource to shared module
designate one owning module; remove duplicate

text.example: preconditions == false -> graph_has_cycle == true -> root_has_direct_resources == true -> conclusion ref.
